title: RefactorContextOutput
description: Output of 'refactor context'. Assembles all deterministic context needed for LLM SQL refactoring.

table.description: Normalised FQN of the target object (schema.name).

object_type.description: Type of catalog object. Absent means 'table' for backwards compatibility.

writer.description: Normalised FQN of the writer procedure. Present for tables only.

proc_body.description: Full SQL body of the writer procedure. Present for tables only.

view_sql.description: Original SQL body of the view. Present for views/MVs only.

profile.description: Profile section from the table catalog.

statements.description: Resolved statement list from the procedure catalog. Present for tables only.

columns.description: Column definitions for the target table.

source_tables.description: Normalised FQNs of tables and views read by the writer procedure.

source_columns.description: Column metadata for each source table/view, keyed by normalised FQN.

test_spec.description: CLI-ready test spec loaded from test-specs/<table>.json. Null when no spec exists.

sandbox.description: Sandbox metadata from manifest.json. Null when no sandbox is configured.
